title: CopyCoords
description: A simple mod that creates hotkeys to copy the coordinates of a block/player's location.
body:
# A simple quality-of-life mod for Minecraft builders, developers, and explorers. # 

**With this mod, you can quickly copy coordinates to your clipboard with a single keypress — no more typing them out manually!**

## 🔑 Key Features

- Press **B** to copy the coordinates of the block you're looking at.
- Press **C** to copy your current player coordinates.

Copied coordinates are formatted as **x y z** and ready to paste anywhere.

## 🛠️ Perfect for:
- Map makers
- Command block users
- Developers
- Anyone who’s tired of manually writing down coords

## ✅ Compatibility
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer (client-side only).
- Lightweight and non-intrusive — just install and go.
